cart.shippingNote: Shipping and taxes calculated at checkout.
cart.outOfStock: This product is out of stock or unavailable in the requested quantity.

checkout.title: CHECKOUT
checkout.emptyDesc: Add some items before checking out.
checkout.addressPlaceholder: Street name, near landmark, house number...
checkout.notesPlaceholder: Delivery instructions, gate code, preferred time…
checkout.deliveryDesc: Drop a pin on the map to mark your exact delivery location. Orders are only accepted within Iraq.
checkout.codDesc: Pay when you receive your order.
checkout.fibDesc: FIB Pay integration is under development.
checkout.fastpayDesc: FastPay wallet integration is under development.

errors.mapRequired: Please pin your delivery location on the map.
errors.mapOutOfIraq: Delivery is only available within Iraq. Please select a location inside Iraq.
errors.orderFailed: Unable to place order. Please try again.

success.heading: Thank You!
success.placed: Your order has been placed successfully.
success.contact: We will contact you shortly to confirm your delivery details.

auth.signInDesc: Sign in with your phone number and password to access your orders, wishlist, and account details.
auth.signUpDesc: Create an account to track orders, save your wishlist, and check out faster. Only a phone number and password required.
auth.passwordSecurity: Your password is hashed and never stored in plain text.
auth.browseCta: Continue browsing without an account on the

profile.title: Personal Information
profile.desc: Update your name and email address.
profile.phoneReadOnly: Phone number is your login identifier and cannot be changed.

address.title: Delivery Addresses
address.mapRequired: Please pin your delivery location on the map inside Iraq.

security.title: Security
security.desc: Manage your password and active sessions.
security.changePasswordDesc: Update the password you use to sign in.
security.signOutAllDesc: This will invalidate all active sessions and refresh tokens everywhere — phones, browsers, and apps.
security.signedOutAll: Signed out of all devices. Redirecting…
security.confirmWarning: Are you sure? You will be signed out here too.
security.failed: Failed to sign out all devices.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.desc: Choose what you want to hear about.
notifications.orderUpdatesDesc: Get notified when your order status changes — confirmed, shipped, delivered.
notifications.promotionsDesc: Receive news about sales, new arrivals, and exclusive deals.
notifications.note: Note: Notification preferences are saved. Actual delivery is not active in this demo.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.languageDesc: Your language preference is applied immediately across the store.
preferences.moreComingSoon: More preferences (currency display, theme) coming soon.

support.title: Support & Help
support.faq1a: Orders within Erbil, Sulaymaniyah, and Duhok are typically delivered within 1–3 business days. Halabja and remote areas may take 3–5 days.
support.faq2q: Can I cancel or change my order?
support.faq2a: Contact us as soon as possible. We can modify or cancel orders that have not yet been dispatched.
support.faq3a: We currently accept Cash on Delivery (COD). Additional payment methods are coming soon.
support.faq4q: How do I return a product?
support.faq4a: If your item arrived damaged or incorrect, contact us within 48 hours of delivery. We will arrange a replacement or full refund.
support.faq5a: Yes. We use HTTPS and never share your information with third parties. Passwords are hashed and never stored in plain text.

map.searchPlaceholder: Search for a street, landmark, or area in Iraq…
map.gpsDenied: Location access denied. Please allow location access or search manually.
map.gpsUnavailable: Unable to determine your location. Please search manually.
map.gpsUnsupported: Geolocation is not supported by your browser.
map.outOfIraq: Delivery is only available within Iraq. Please select a location inside Iraq.
map.hint: Search for your area above, or click directly on the map to pin your delivery location.
